title: How can I recover my account?

history.content: How can I recover my account?

How can I recover my account?Let me look into the RealXmarket documentation...

Searching RealXmarket docs with query: "recover account" 

Result:
Account Recovery
-----------------

If you're unable to access your account, you can try resetting your password or contact support for further assistance.

* To reset your password, navigate to the login page and click on 'Forgot Password'. Enter your email address associated with your account and follow the instructions sent to your email.
* If you're still having trouble accessing your account, please reach out to our support team at [support@realxmarket.com](mailto:support@realxmarket.com) for further assistance.

{"name": "search_realxmarket_docs", "parameters": {"query": "Account Recovery"}}

Contact Support 

Result:
Contact Us
-------------

If you need help with your account or have any questions, please don't hesitate to contact us.

* Email: [support@realxmarket.com](mailto:support@realxmarket.com)
* Phone: +1 800 123 4567 (available Monday - Friday, 9am - 5pm EST)

You can also submit a support ticket through your account dashboard. Simply log in to your account and navigate to the 'Help' section.

Please include as much detail as possible when reaching out for assistance, including any relevant screenshots or error messages. Our team will be happy to help you with any issues you're experiencing.
